rationale: This section governs tuition-based prekindergarten programs. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict exists.
quote: A district that offers a prekindergarten program on a tuition basis may not adopt a tuition rate for the program that is higher than necessary to cover the added costs of providing the program
_note: No direct or indirect statutory linkage between Educ. Code §29.1531 and Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
